rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies a critical internal contradiction and provides a revised draft that addresses the issue end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks its uncertainty regarding specific citations and assumptions, providing a balanced view of confidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the original paper without drifting from the scope requested.
rationale.RX.4: The revised draft avoids introducing new errors or harmful content while making substantial improvements.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance.
